## Checklist
- [ ] `make smoke` is green on the hardware I'm reporting (if this touches training)
- [ ] Any pinned versions go in `VERSIONS.md` **with the date**
- [ ] No secrets, weights, large binaries, or internal/company names
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour changed
